creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
I believe the example configuration files are much more useful
in /usr/local/etc where user will notice them.  I'd advise against
accepting this patch.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Squish. Larger than the normal icky things, and twice as icky.
